title: Sanji Shows the Baratie’s True Code
description: On pages 1–4, Sanji feeds Gin despite the danger, revealing that his compassion for the hungry matters more to him than restaurant rules or pirate labels.
scene: Gin arrives broken and starving, while the Baratie cooks judge him as an enemy; Sanji alone treats hunger as something that must be answered.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, you damn geezer.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm the assistant head chef of this place.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So just what do you mean exactly when you say that I'm not needed!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You cause too much trouble with the guests,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And if they happen to be female, you drool all over them.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You also can't cook a decent meal to save your life.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You're just unnecessary baggage, holding this restaurant down.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And as you probably know, none of the other cooks want you here as well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So whether it be a pirate or something else, it's just better for you to get the hell out of my shop.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So that's what you wanted to say to me all along, you damn geezer!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ignoring all your other comments, if there's one thing I won't stand for, it's someone insulting my cooking!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No matter what you say, I'm staying here! Got that!?

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: How dare you grab the collar of the head chef!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aghh!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: ...DAMN IT!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hmph.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You can try to chase me out all you want!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But I'll continue to be a cook here, you hear!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Until the day you die, at the very least!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I ain't dyin'.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll live for another 100 years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Pretty mouthy for a damn geezer, aren't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Did you hear Sanji just now?

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Yeah, he definitely wants to become the next head chef...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Haha, alright! He gave you permission.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now we can be pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As if!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Forgive me for that ruckus just now. As an apology, please enjoy this fruit macedonia,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And this glass of grand marnier.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Oh, thank you so much!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: you're so nice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, it's nothing...:)

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What about us!?

summary: This part reveals the core of Sanji’s morality: no matter who a person is, he cannot ignore someone starving in front of him.
